mnemonics: Pete's Dinner Is Ready Now (LPDRN) - Last Process Dead, Result Not Yet ( Last Process is considered Dead when it hasn't been swapped out and its pages aren't ready )
Pete's Dinner Is Ready Now (LPDRN) - Last Process Dead, Result Ready Now ( Last Process is considered Dead when its pages aren't ready )
keyPoints: Peterson's solution is a synchronization algorithm
It uses two variables, 'v' and 'w' to protect the critical section
The algorithm ensures that only one process can access the shared resource at a time
Peterson's solution is useful in situations where there is no clock or other synchronization mechanism available
